title: Select all subitems within (or under) an item
excerpt: It would be great if we could select all the subitems of an item by checking the top box (next to the Subitems title) in the new board experience—the same way we can select all the tasks within a group by clicking the bo…

posts.author: ashleylyn07 (Ashley Boose)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if we could select all the subitems of an item by checking the top box (next to the Subitems title) in the new board experience—the same way we can select all the tasks within a group by clicking the box above the top item in the group.

Screenshot of (10) Subitems of New Employee Setup572×535 43.1 KB

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can. Just click the box where your arrow is pointing to.

image577×591 40.4 KB

posts.author: ashleylyn07 (Ashley Boose)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve tried that already over and over again and it’s never worked for me. I’ve tried it in the Windows app, Chrome browser, Firefox, etc. When I hover over the box, my cursor turns into a pointer like I should be able to click it, but when I click the box, nothing happens. It works when I select all in a group, but not for subitems.

posts.author: ccreevy (carmel creevy)
posts.cookedHtml: Were you able to figure this out? We are running into the same issue but with only one board specifically.

posts.author: ashleylyn07 (Ashley Boose)
posts.cookedHtml: Actually, I never really figured it out for myself, but soon after I posted this, it started working. I just assumed someone from Monday fixed it for me?
